title: Sweet Fluffy Ukrainian Lentils Stew
description: A hearty, comforting, and sweet Ukrainian lentil stew made with French lentils and cooked in a Ttukbaegi earthenware pot, perfect for a chilly evening. This dish is also Jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: French green lentils
ingredients.notes: Rinse and pick through for debris.

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Peel and chop into bite-sized pieces.

instructions: Heat the Ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add the olive oil and sauté the onions until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the carrots and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the French green lentils, vegetable broth, tomato paste, brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
